commands_run: curl official Common Voice, Mozilla legal-docs, MDC, GitHub API, and LDC pages/PDFs
rg over fetched official text for license/terms evidence
tests_not_run: No code tests: rights audit only

data_accessed.type: official public GitHub URL, returned 404 via API
official Expresso project page used because requested GitHub URL was unavailable

claims: permissive_release: allowed only for dataset-level CC0/permissive sources and consent-cleared private recordings, with exact dataset URL/version, license string, accepted terms, and MDC/Common Voice no-reidentification/no-mirroring compliance notes.

research_noncommercial: allowed for private/internal research only when terms are accepted; not for public/commercial YouthNaturalLoRA release. Expresso is CC BY-NC 4.0; MyST and CSLU are non-commercial/research bounded.
separately_licensed: blocked until executed license grants the exact training/release use. MyST, CSLU, and CMU Kids require signed/provider agreements and possibly commercial addenda.

user_consent_private: allowed only with documented speaker consent and guardian consent for minors covering voice/likeness/model-training grant, commercial/release/downstream rights, retention, deletion, revocation, privacy, and biometric terms.

blocked_or_unknown: do not use unlicensed or missing-license datasets, private audio without consent, NC/research-only data for public/commercial release, unreviewed MDC datasets, or the exact facebookresearch/expresso GitHub URL until resolved.
known_risks: This is not a final legal decision.
CC0 lowers copyright friction but does not eliminate privacy, publicity, biometric, or anti-reidentification obligations.
MDC terms are platform terms in addition to dataset licenses.
Children's speech datasets carry elevated consent/privacy risk even when licensed.
Training on NC/research-only data may contaminate releasable model weights.
integration_notes: For YouthNaturalLoRA release builds, keep a manifest that excludes Expresso and LDC unless legal signs off on an exact license grant.
Tag each source row with lane, license URL, checked date, allowed_use, prohibited_use, and evidence_path.
Prefer Common Voice CC0/MDC verified datasets plus explicit private-consent recordings for releasable LoRA work.
Keep restricted research experiments physically and logically separate from release checkpoints.
